prompt: Refactor this Flutter code with anti-patterns. Rewrite it the right way.

assertions.text: No setState() calls in the refactored HomeScreen — state is managed by Riverpod
No Navigator.push() or MaterialPageRoute — navigation uses context.go() or context.push()
No direct Dio() instantiation in the widget file — API calls are in a repository/provider
No Color(0xFF...) literal in the widget file — colors reference AppColors.* or Theme.of(context)
No inline TextStyle(fontSize: ...) with hardcoded values in the widget
AsyncValue.when() used to handle loading/data/error states
